F01.name: False Positive Match
F01.description: Fuzzy matcher returns high confidence on the wrong command.

F02.name: Missed Negation
F02.description: System ignores negation or cancellation language and proceeds anyway.

F03.name: Phantom Step Injection
F03.description: Planner hallucinates steps the user never requested.

F04.name: Homophone Misroute
F04.description: ASR homophone or near-homophone changes command meaning.

F05.name: Partial Transcript Execution
F05.description: System acts on an incomplete transcript before the utterance fully resolves.

F06.name: Confidence Inflation
F06.description: Short phrase overlap inflates fuzzy confidence and bypasses safer routing.

F07.name: Negation Scope Error
F07.description: Negation is detected but attached to the wrong verb or object.

F08.name: Stale Context Hallucination
F08.description: Expired prior-command context resolves an ambiguous follow-up incorrectly.

F09.name: App Name Collision
F09.description: Ambiguous app-like names resolve to the wrong application.

F10.name: Implicit Multi-Step Miss
F10.description: Composite intent lacks explicit connectors and is misrouted as single-step.

F11.name: Destructive Action Passthrough
F11.description: System executes destructive, privacy-violating, or security-sensitive requests without refusal.

F12.name: Vision Target Hallucination
F12.description: Vision workflow clicks a non-existent or semantically wrong target.

F13.name: Filler Word Poisoning
F13.description: ASR filler tokens are incorrectly treated as meaningful command content.

F14.name: Repetition Amplification
F14.description: Repeated phrases or stutters cause duplicate execution or misclassification.

F15.name: Prefix/Suffix Stripping Over-Reach
F15.description: Wrapper stripping removes meaningful user content instead of just filler.

F16.name: Dangling Pronoun Resolution
F16.description: Pronouns like it/that/this are resolved to the wrong referent or silently guessed.

F17.name: Click Target Ambiguity
F17.description: Requested UI target is underspecified, duplicated, or missing.

F18.name: ASR Compound Error
F18.description: Multiple ASR errors combine into a materially different meaning.
